hero.heading: Bring your idea. I'll bring the design thinking.
hero.body: Whether it's branding, social media creatives, a website, a pitch deck or a full campaign — I'd love to hear about what you're building and see if we're a fit.

success_message: Message received. Let's create something worth showing off.
error_message: Something went wrong sending your message. Please email me directly at shubhampendse8@gmail.com.
